system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, I just got a tablet from you guys, but I lost it already. Can you give me the tracking number for that order? Maybe you can help me with a refund or a reorder? I know it's probably not possible, but I thought I'd ask.

I’d be happy to help you with your order details, including the tracking number. To get started, I need to verify your identity. Could you please provide either:

- The email address associated with your account, or
- Your first name, last name, and zip code

Once I’ve verified your account, I’ll look up your tablet order and provide the tracking information. Regarding a refund or reorder due to loss after delivery, our policy does not cover lost items after delivery, but I can confirm your order status and options once I access your account.
Alright, my name is Olivia Lopez and my zip code is 76171. I don’t have an email, so hopefully that’s enough. Can you check the tablet order for me and let me know the tracking number?
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for providing your name and zip code. I will try to locate your account using this information and then look up your tablet order and tracking number.

Could you please confirm if you have any other details, such as an order number or the approximate date of your purchase? This may help in case there are multiple orders under your name. Meanwhile, I’ll proceed with the information you’ve provided.
I don’t have the order number handy, but I got the tablet pretty recently—maybe within the last week or so. That’s all I remember. Can you check with just my name and zip code?
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm having trouble accessing your account with just your name and zip code due to a technical issue. To assist you further, I recommend contacting a human agent who can help resolve this for you.

Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent for further assistance?
Yeah, go ahead and transfer me to a human agent. I really need that tracking number for the tablet.

arguments.summary: User Olivia Lopez (zip 76171) needs the tracking number for a recently delivered tablet order. Unable to retrieve user details due to technical issues with account lookup. User does not have email or order number.

messages.content: Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm currently unable to complete the transfer to a human agent due to a technical issue. I apologize for the inconvenience.

For immediate assistance, I recommend reaching out to our customer service team directly through our website or by phone, as they will be able to access your account and provide the tracking number for your tablet order.

If you have any other details or if the system becomes available, I’ll be happy to assist further. Thank you for your understanding.

Alright, thanks for letting me know. While I have you, can you help me with something else? I just bought a charger that goes with the tablet, but since I lost the tablet, I don’t need the charger anymore. Can you cancel that charger order for me?

I can help you with your charger order cancellation. To proceed, I’ll need to verify your identity and locate your account. Since I’m currently unable to access your account using your name and zip code due to a technical issue, I won’t be able to process the cancellation right now.

If you have an email address or any other information that might help identify your account, please provide it. Otherwise, I recommend contacting our customer service team directly for immediate assistance with your cancellation request.

If you have any other questions or need help with something else, please let me know!

I don’t have an email, just my name and zip code. If you can’t do it, I’ll try calling later. 

Actually, I also ordered a boot and a kettle recently. If possible, can you cancel the boot and keep the kettle? If not, just leave that order alone.

Thank you for your understanding. At this time, I’m unable to access your account or orders using just your name and zip code due to a technical issue. Because of this, I’m unable to process cancellations or make changes to your orders.

For the fastest resolution, I recommend calling our customer service team directly. They’ll be able to verify your identity and assist with your requests regarding the charger, boot, and kettle orders.

If you have any other questions or if you’re able to provide additional account information in the future, I’ll be happy to help. Thank you for your patience and understanding.
Alright, I’ll call customer service later. One last thing—can you help me with a return for a sneaker I bought? If not, I’ll just wait and try again another time.

At this time, I’m unable to access your account or order details using just your name and zip code due to a technical issue. Because of this, I’m unable to process a return for your sneaker order right now.

I recommend contacting our customer service team directly by phone for assistance with your return. They’ll be able to verify your identity and help you with the process.

If you have any other questions or if you’re able to provide additional account information in the future, I’ll be happy to assist. Thank you for your understanding.
Alright, thanks for your help. I’ll try calling later. Have a good day.

You’re very welcome. I’m sorry I couldn’t assist further due to the technical issue. Thank you for your patience and understanding. If you need help in the future and have more account details, feel free to reach out.

Have a great day!
Thanks. Bye.
You're welcome! If you need any help in the future, feel free to reach out. Goodbye and take care!
Bye.
Goodbye! Have a wonderful day.
You too.
Thank you! If you need anything else in the future, I’m here to help. Take care!
Thanks, I appreciate it. Take care!
You're very welcome! Take care and have a great day!
You too—thanks!
Thank you! Wishing you a great day ahead!
Thanks! Same to you.
Thank you! If you ever need assistance, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day!
Will do. Thanks again!
You're welcome! Take care and have a great day!
You too!
Thank you! Goodbye!
Goodbye!

arguments.summary: User Olivia Lopez (zip 76171) needs the tracking number for a recently delivered tablet order. Unable to retrieve user details due to technical issues with account lookup. User does not have email or order number.
